asset.title: Noderoom Live Collab V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: The video effectively demonstrates a multiplayer AI workspace with real-time spreadsheet collaboration between humans and agents, backed by conflict resolution logic.

featureClarity.evidence: Clear demonstration of agent and human co-editing a spreadsheet.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full loop of prompting, agent execution, and state update.

visualDesign.evidence: Polished dark mode UI, though some panels are crowded.

consistency.evidence: Aligns perfectly with the spreadsheet, chat, and trace paradigm.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture with real-time state transitions.

legibility.evidence: Most text is legible, but code font size is small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for developers of collaborative AI tools.

productionHonesty.evidence: Honestly presents the collaboration substrate as the core product.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet UI with live cell updates

defects.observed: Code snippet is highly detailed and hard to read in the brief time shown.
defects.fix: Simplify the code display or extend the duration of the slide.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Noderoom Live Collab: Multi-agent and human spreadsheet collaboration with built-in conflict resolution.
